description: OpenPipe is a platform for logging, evaluating, fine-tuning, and serving LLM-based applications and agents. It provides managed model training and inference workflows, including chat completions, datasets, models, and criteria-based evaluation.
summary: OpenPipe exposes one authenticated HTTP API at `https://api.openpipe.ai/api/v1`, documented with Mintlify pages and a published OpenAPI JSON pointer, using a project API key as Bearer auth.
